faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Oakwood, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Oakwood typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property, the severity of the infestation, and the number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work in my Oakwood home?
faqs.answer: Most customers see significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours of treatment. However, complete elimination typically requires 2-3 weeks as treatments target fleas at different life stages. We often recommend a follow-up treatment after 14 days to eliminate newly hatched fleas.

faqs.question: Are flea treatments safe for my pets and children in Oakwood?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved, pet-safe flea treatment products that are highly effective yet safe for your family and pets. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces dry completely, then they can return safely.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day flea treatment service in Oakwood?
faqs.answer: Yes, we understand that flea infestations require urgent attention. We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Oakwood and Staten Island when you call before noon. Our team is equipped to handle emergency flea situations quickly and effectively.
